name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Garland, TX's Superb Cash Advance at 4047 Forest Ln provides quick payday loans with evening and weekend hours.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance's Garland location sits at 4047 Forest Ln #20c in Garland, TX, providing a straightforward storefront for quick cash needs. The branch operates Monday through Thursday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, Friday from 9 AM to 8:30 PM, and weekend hours Saturday 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM and Sunday 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM.

This Garland payday lender handles short-term cash advances and title loans for local borrowers. Customers can reach the team at +1 469-290-1130 to discuss rates, terms, and available loan amounts during business hours.

For Garland residents needing immediate cash, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a bank account statement. This location serves the Forest Ln corridor and surrounding neighborhoods.
pros: Same-day funding available for approved applicants
No credit check required; accepts all credit types
Extended business hours including weekends (9:30am–6:30pm Sat-Sun)
Minimal documentation required for quick approval
Flexible payment schedules customized to individual budgets
Physical storefront location for in-person service
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on website—critical terms hidden
As a payday/cash advance lender, products likely carry 400%+ APR and short repayment terms, creating debt cycle risk
Customer reviews are outdated (mostly 2+ years old) and some reference different locations (Arvada), suggesting content accuracy issues
No transparency about loan terms, default consequences, or borrower protections
Broad product range ($250–$50,000) and multiple loan types raise questions about licensing compliance in Georgia
best_for: Borrowers with poor credit seeking immediate emergency cash without traditional underwriting
Working individuals needing funds outside standard business hours (evenings/weekends)
Applicants who prefer in-person service over fully online lenders
People facing short-term cash shortfalls who cannot access bank loans or credit cards
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is designed for borrowers with limited credit options who need emergency cash quickly and prefer in-person service. The critical caveat is that the company discloses no interest rates, APRs, or fees online—typical payday/cash advance products carry 400%+ APR with short terms that frequently trap borrowers in debt cycles. Verify all terms, costs, and Georgia regulatory compliance before borrowing.
services: In-person loan processing at physical location
meta_description: Garland, TX's Superb Cash Advance at 4047 Forest Ln offers fast payday loans with convenient weekend hours.
